ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session during which the course is offered (e.g., Summer, Fall) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or information about the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* The number of credits the course is worth */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* The prerequisites for the course (e.g., other courses, skills) */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* The format of the course (e.g., online, in-person, hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the personnel */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the personnel */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affiliation of the personnel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the personnel */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the personnel at their affiliation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the personnel */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the personnel (if applicable) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "affiliation_location" TEXT /* Location of the affiliation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the affiliation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the affiliation */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the affiliation */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Course Director, Lecturer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the role is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_personnel" (
  "course_personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-personnel relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the personnel in the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the personnel's involvement in the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the personnel's involvement in the course */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the personnel is the primary contact for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_personnel_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_personnel_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_personnel_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session (e.g., Summer, Fall) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., lecture, lab, discussion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sessions" (
  "course_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-session relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "meeting_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the course session meets */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Time of day the course session meets */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the course session meets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sessions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (if applicable) */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel (if applicable) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., general, technical, administrative) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the note (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
